title: Revert Feed banner + slogan UI changes

requirements.summary: Revert the Feed page to the pre-banner state by removing the hero banner from the top of the feed.
acceptanceCriteria: Visiting the Feed page (route "/") no longer shows the full-width banner image at the top of the page.

file_operations.description: Remove the `FeedHeroBanner` import and stop rendering the hero banner at the top of the Feed page, keeping the rest of the feed layout intact.

requirements.summary: Remove the recently added slogan text from all UI locations introduced by the banner/slogan change set.
acceptanceCriteria: The exact text "Giving everyone a voice!" is no longer displayed beneath the Feed hero area (and is not displayed as part of the reverted banner/slogan change set).
There are no remaining hardcoded instances of the slogan string that were added as part of the recent banner/slogan updates.

file_operations.description: Remove the hardcoded slogan text "Giving everyone a voice!" from the branding banner UI so it is no longer rendered.
Delete the `FeedHeroBanner` component to fully remove the banner+slogan UI introduced by the recent change set and prevent any remaining hardcoded slogan usage.

requirements.summary: Remove now-unused static banner asset references introduced by the banner change and ensure the frontend builds cleanly.
acceptanceCriteria: The codebase no longer references `/assets/generated/feed-hero-banner.dim_2400x600.png` from the Feed hero/banner UI.
The frontend builds and runs without TypeScript or lint errors related to removed components or imports.

file_operations.description: Remove the generated banner asset file `frontend/public/assets/generated/feed-hero-banner.dim_2400x600.png` that was introduced for the Feed hero banner so there are no remaining banner asset references.
